goal: Implement ingestion inputs: file walker with incremental hashing, Python AST parser, and structure phase

tasks.name: Implement file walker with gitignore filtering and content hashing
microSteps: Write tests for walk() discovering .py files in a temp directory tree
Write tests for gitignore filtering (respects .gitignore patterns)
Write tests for content hashing (hashlib.sha256 of file content)
Write tests for skipping __pycache__, .git, .cnogo directories
Run tests to verify RED
Implement FileEntry dataclass (path, content, language, content_hash)
Implement walk(repo_path) using pathlib.rglob('*.py')
Implement gitignore parsing (read .gitignore, convert glob patterns to pathlib matching)
Implement content_hash() using hashlib.sha256
Implement default skip patterns (__pycache__, .git, .cnogo, node_modules, .venv)
Run tests to verify GREEN
tasks.action: File walker using pathlib.rglob(). Returns list[FileEntry] with path, content, language='python', content_hash. Supports .gitignore patterns via fnmatch. Default skip: __pycache__, .git, .cnogo, node_modules, .venv, .tox. Content hash via hashlib.sha256 for incremental re-indexing support.

tasks.name: Implement Python AST parser
microSteps: Write tests for parsing functions (name, start_line, end_line, signature)
Write tests for parsing classes and methods (class_name linkage)
Write tests for extracting imports (import X, from X import Y, relative imports)
Write tests for extracting calls (simple calls, method calls, chained calls)
Write tests for extracting heritage (class Foo(Bar) → extends relationship)
Write tests for extracting type annotations (param types, return types)
Run tests to verify RED
Implement ParseResult dataclass (symbols, imports, calls, heritage, type_refs)
Implement SymbolInfo, ImportInfo, CallInfo, TypeRef dataclasses
Implement PythonParser.parse(content, file_path) using ast.parse()
Implement _walk_ast() to visit FunctionDef, AsyncFunctionDef, ClassDef nodes
Implement _extract_imports() for Import and ImportFrom nodes
Implement _extract_calls() walking ast.Call nodes recursively
Implement _extract_heritage() from ClassDef.bases
Implement _extract_types() from annotations
Run tests to verify GREEN
tasks.action: Python parser using stdlib ast module. Parse source into SymbolInfo (name, kind, start/end line, signature, class_name, decorators), ImportInfo (module, names, is_relative), CallInfo (name, line, receiver, arguments), TypeRef (name, kind, line), and heritage tuples (class, kind, parent). Follow axon's PythonParser pattern but use ast.NodeVisitor instead of tree-sitter. Extract __all__ exports. Build signatures from ast.FunctionDef args + returns.

tasks.name: Implement structure phase (File/Folder nodes + CONTAINS edges)
microSteps: Write tests for process_structure() creating File nodes from FileEntry list
Write tests for Folder node creation from file paths
Write tests for CONTAINS edges between folders and between folder→file
Run tests to verify RED
Create scripts/context/phases/ package with __init__.py
Implement process_structure(files, storage) creating FILE nodes
Implement folder extraction from unique directory paths
Implement CONTAINS relationship creation (folder→subfolder, folder→file)
Run tests to verify GREEN
tasks.action: Structure phase creates File and Folder nodes + CONTAINS edges. For each FileEntry, create a FILE node. Extract unique directory paths, create FOLDER nodes. Connect folders with CONTAINS relationships (parent→child folder, folder→file). Use PurePosixPath for platform-independent path handling. Store content_hash in FILE node properties for incremental support.

commitMessage: feat(context-graph): add file walker, Python AST parser, and structure phase
